xsl:for-each.select: /offer/products/product[ price/@gross > 0 and description/name/. != '' and not( category/@id = '1214553885' or category/@id = '1214553884' )]

xsl:when.test: (../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN10' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'ISBN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN8' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN13' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN14' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'GTIN12' or ../../@producer_code_standard = 'UPCE') and @code_producer!=''
$cat_id = '5976' or $cat_id = '5977' or $cat_id = '5980' or $cat_id = '5985' or $cat_id = '5989' or $cat_id = '5990' or $cat_id = '5991' or $cat_id = '5992' or $cat_id = '5994'
